title: I'd love to be able to reorder automations

I have several automations that have 16+ subitems that are generated and when I need to add or change any of them I have to start from scratch to put them in the correct order.

posts.author: Fins8 (Lara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have several automations that have 16+ subitems that are generated and when I need to add or change any of them I have to start from scratch to put them in the correct order.

What are you trying to achieve

I have several automations that have 16+ subitems that are generated and when I need to add or change any of them I have to start from scratch to put them in the correct order.
